title: Signal Distill — per-signal record
description: Fixed shape every collected signal MUST conform to. Subagents return arrays of these; the merge step concatenates and sorts by relevance_score descending.

id.description: Stable dedupe key. Prefer the source's native id; else sha1(url). Used to dedupe across runs.

url.description: Permalink to the original item. Required for attribution — never emit a signal without it.

author.description: Who said it (handle/username). Empty string only if the source is genuinely anonymous.

captured_at.description: ISO-8601 timestamp of when this signal was collected.

summary.description: 1-2 sentence neutral summary. No first-person laundering.

quote.description: Verbatim excerpt worth riffing on or quoting. Empty string if no single line stands out.

category.description: Signal type. See references/scoring-rubric.md for definitions.

velocity.description: Optional engagement-per-hour if the source exposes timestamps; else null.

relevance_score.description: 0-1 relevance to the user's work. Computed via references/scoring-rubric.md. NOT a raw engagement number.

relevance_rationale.description: One sentence naming the specific product/repo/experience this maps to, or why it does not.

disposition.description: Routing decision. draft_ready: confirmed depth. interview_needed: hot but unconfirmed. skip: no real connection.

interview_questions.description: Required (2-3 entries) when disposition is 'interview_needed'; omit otherwise. Each answerable in 1-2 sentences.
